resultPayload.note: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of provider portfolios/reviews being visible.

evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of provider portfolios/reviews being visible.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that provider portfolios and reviews are visible to customers. However, the evidence provided does not include any explicit API reads or checks confirming that these portfolios and reviews are accessible. The linked use case describes a scenario where a homeowner reviews portfolios, but there is no concrete evidence of an API interaction or state check that confirms this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of provider portfolios/reviews being visible to customers.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the visibility of provider portfolios and reviews.
